name: Force-Torque Contact Surface Probing
description: A robotics engineer at an automotive parts manufacturer is developing a robot-mounted force probe system to inspect machined surfaces for flatness and consistent contact properties. Using the CoppeliaSim ZMQ Remote API (port 23000), program the robot arm to perform systematic force-torque contact probing of a respondable cuboid surface at a grid of at least 12 points. Detect contact when the Z-component of force exceeds a threshold of 0.5 N. Record the contact position (x, y, z) and the full force/torque vector at each point. Export the contact map to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/contact_probing.csv with columns for probe_id, target_x, target_y, contact_z, force_x, force_y, force_z, torque_x, torque_y, torque_z, and contact_detected. Additionally, export a summary analysis report to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/probing_report.json including fields for total_probes, contacts_detected, avg_contact_force_n, max_force_n, surface_height_range_m, grid_rows, and grid_cols.
